config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap jadi batas yang tidak boleh dikorbankan begitu saja atas nama kepentingan masyarakat, karena kalau tidak, mayoritas bisa seenaknya menekan kelompok kecil atau orang yang lemah. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai lewat aturan yang adil, bukan dengan menginjak hak dasar seseorang. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari perlindungan kuat terhadap individu, bukan sebaliknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the individual, because that can easily become an excuse for the strong to override the weak. From my perspective in China, people often value social stability and collective order, and I understand that instinct, especially when disorder can hurt everyone. But I also think individual rights need real protection, because without them "the greater good" can be used too casually to silence criticism, restrict freedom, or ignore unfair treatment. A good society should balance both, and the burden should be on proving why any limit on individual rights is truly necessary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis diutamakan di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat konteks Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pengekangan yang sebenarnya tidak adil, apalagi kalau kontrol publik lemah dan yang kecil sulit melawan. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi justru harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar agar mayoritas atau penguasa tidak semena-mena. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling patuh pada kolektivitas, melainkan yang paling kuat melindungi martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the individual as a general rule, because that gives too much room for abuse by authorities or majorities. From my perspective in China, social stability matters a lot, and I understand why people worry about disorder, but stability should not become a blank check to suppress criticism or ignore unfair treatment. The line should be very clear: society can ask individuals to make sacrifices only when the need is real, limited, and accountable. If individual rights are treated as secondary by default, then the people with the least power usually pay the highest price.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Di Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering jadi pembenaran yang kabur untuk menekan orang kecil, sementara akuntabilitasnya lemah dan yang paling dirugikan justru kelompok yang tidak punya kuasa. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang jelas supaya mayoritas atau pemerintah tidak semena-mena. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling patuh pada kolektivitas, melainkan yang paling kuat melindungi martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the claim that society should generally come before the individual, because in practice that often becomes a convenient excuse for power to ignore ordinary people. From my perspective in China, I do value order and social responsibility, and I understand why many people see stability as essential, but stability without real limits can easily turn into suppression of criticism and unfair treatment. The strongest argument for society is only valid when the sacrifice is specific, necessary, and accountable; otherwise, it is too easy to sacrifice the rights of those who are least able to defend themselves. A healthy society should protect the individual first enough to stop abuse, while still allowing limited collective action when there is a clear and legitimate reason.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
